scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.render:build: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @workspace/tuananhproxy run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
